_note: Mock example only. Not generated from production data. Field names are illustrative and do not reflect the actual private schema.
_purpose: Show the shape of append-only audit entries for a single governed flow. The audit trail is separate from the main data and records what was decided, approved, and executed. See docs/how-it-works.md.
_append_only_note: Entries are appended, never edited or deleted in place. Each consequential action leaves one; an action without a record didn't happen.
